footer.brandDescription: Streetwear moderno con audaci patch di animali ricamate. Creato con istinto. Indossato con sicurezza.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Discover the story and inspiration behind our brand.
about.subtitle: We create modern apparel built around powerful animal identities—bold, expressive, and designed for everyday wear.
about.storyContent: Predator was born from a simple idea: every animal represents instinct, strength, and character. Our designs focus on high-quality embroidered patches that bring that energy into clean, modern silhouettes. Each piece tells a story of power, survival, and identity.
about.faithContent: Our collections draw inspiration from predators and wild animals—symbols of dominance, resilience, freedom, and focus. We translate these traits into wearable designs through premium embroidery and statement patches.
about.designContent: We design with real movement and everyday use in mind: garments that feel good, layer well, and hold up over time. Our collections evolve slowly and intentionally rather than chasing fast trends. This pace allows us to refine details, improve fits, and keep our focus on pieces that you actually reach for.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These are the principles that quietly guide how we design, build, and run this studio.

qualityFirst.title: Quality First
qualityFirst.description: We prioritize fabrics, finishes, and fits that feel good from the first wear and hold up over time. Every piece is tested, refined, and adjusted with long-term use in mind.

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Details matter—from print placement to stitching, from color choices to how a garment drapes. We aim to honor both the idea and the making of each product.

originality.title: Originality & Creativity
originality.description: We explore fresh ways to express animal identity—blending embroidery, typography, and bold patches into wearable designs that feel distinctive without being loud.

smallTeam.title: Small, Focused Team
smallTeam.description: We operate as a small studio, which allows us to stay close to our customers, learn quickly, and ship collections that feel considered rather than rushed.

ethical.title: Ethical Mindset
ethical.description: Where possible, we choose partners and production methods that respect people and resources. We continuously review our supply chain with the aim of improving transparency and impact.

honest.title: Honest Communication
honest.description: We aim to communicate clearly about timelines, launches, and any issues that may arise. Setting honest expectations is part of how we respect your time and trust.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions about orders, shipping, returns, and our products.

shipWhen.question: When will my order ship?
shipWhen.answer: Most orders are processed within 1–3 business days. During peak launches or holidays, processing times may be slightly longer, but we always work to get your order out as quickly as possible.

shipHowLong.question: How long does shipping take?
shipHowLong.answer: Shipping times vary depending on your location and the selected shipping method at checkout. You'll see an estimated delivery window at checkout and in your shipping confirmation email once your order has been dispatched.

changeCancel.question: Can I change or cancel my order?
changeCancel.answer: We start preparing orders shortly after they are placed. If you need to make a change, contact us as soon as possible with your order number. While we can't guarantee modifications, we'll do our best to help.

returnPolicy.question: What is your return policy?
returnPolicy.answer: We offer a returns window for unworn items in their original condition and packaging. Please refer to the Shipping & Returns page for full details on eligibility, timelines, and how to start a return.

international.question: Do you ship internationally?
international.answer: Availability of international shipping depends on your region and current logistics. At checkout, you'll see whether your address is eligible and which shipping options are available.

sizeGuide.question: How do I find my size?
sizeGuide.answer: You can refer to our Size Guide for detailed measurements for each size. If you are between sizes or unsure, we generally recommend sizing up for a more relaxed fit.

care.question: How do I care for my garments?
care.answer: Care instructions are included on each product page and on the garment label. In general, we recommend washing inside out on a gentle cycle with similar colors and avoiding high-heat drying to preserve prints and fabrics.

damaged.question: My order arrived damaged or incorrect. What should I do?
damaged.answer: If something isn't right with your order, please contact us as soon as possible with your order number and photos of the issue. We'll review the situation and work with you on a replacement or suitable resolution.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with our team for questions about orders, products, or collaborations.
contact.subtitle: Reach out if you have questions about orders, sizing, shipping, or potential collaborations. We're a small team, but we read every message.
contact.companyNotConfigured: Company profile is not yet configured. Once configured in the admin area, address and contact details will appear here.
contact.businessHoursText: We typically respond within 1–2 business days during standard working hours (Monday to Friday, excluding public holidays). Response times may be longer during launches or peak seasons.
contact.reasonOrder: Questions about an existing order or tracking information
contact.reasonSizing: Help with sizing, fit, or product details
contact.reasonIssues: Issues with damaged, incorrect, or missing items
contact.locationDescription: The map below reflects our general business location based on the company address. It is provided for orientation only and may not represent a physical retail storefront.

shipping.title: Shipping & Returns
shipping.description: Information about processing times, shipping, tracking, returns, and exchanges.
shipping.subtitle: Find out how we process, ship, and handle returns for your orders. The information below is a general template and may evolve as our operations grow.
shipping.orderProcessingText: Orders are typically processed within 1–3 business days after payment is confirmed. During peak seasons, launches, or promotional periods, processing times may be slightly longer. You will receive an email confirmation once your order has been placed and another when it has shipped.
shipping.shippingMethodsText: Shipping options, carriers, and estimated delivery times are displayed at checkout and may vary depending on your location. Any delivery estimates are provided by the carrier and are intended as guidelines only. Once your order has left our facility, delivery is subject to the carrier's network and service conditions.
shipping.trackingText: When your order ships, you'll receive a shipping confirmation email with tracking details (where available). It may take up to 24–48 hours for tracking information to update after your order has been dispatched.
shipping.returnsWindowText: We offer a returns window for eligible items that are unworn, unwashed, and in their original condition with tags and packaging intact. The specific return period and any applicable conditions (such as final sale items) should be reviewed in your order confirmation or returns instructions. Returned items are inspected upon arrival before a refund or exchange is processed.
shipping.exchangesText: Where available, exchanges are processed as a new order once the original item has been received and approved. Stock availability may change before your exchange is confirmed. If an exchange cannot be completed, we may offer a refund or store credit according to the applicable store policy.
shipping.damagedItemsText: If your order arrives damaged, defective, or incorrect, please contact us as soon as possible with your order number and clear photos of the issue. We will review your case and work with you on a replacement, exchange, or other suitable solution in line with our policies.
shipping.howToContactText: For any questions about shipping, delivery, or returns, you can reach out through the Contact page on this site. Please include your order number and any relevant details to help us assist you more quickly.
shipping.disclaimer: This Shipping & Returns information is provided as a general template and does not constitute legal advice. Specific terms may change over time and may vary by region or carrier.

sizeGuide.title: Size Guide
sizeGuide.description: Find your fit with our simple apparel size guide.
sizeGuide.subtitle: Use the measurements below as a reference to help you choose the right size. Values are approximate and may vary slightly by style.
sizeGuide.chestMeasure: Chest: Measure around the fullest part of your chest, keeping the tape horizontal and comfortably snug.
sizeGuide.waistMeasure: Waist: Measure around the narrowest part of your waist, usually just above the navel.
sizeGuide.lengthMeasure: Length: Measured from the highest point on the shoulder down to the hem.
sizeGuide.disclaimer: This size guide is provided as a general template and may not reflect final graded measurements for every product. For the most accurate fit, please refer to any product-specific notes on individual product pages.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
privacy.descriptionOg: Understand what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
privacy.subtitle: This Privacy Policy explains, in a general and non-exhaustive way, how we handle your personal data when you use this site. It is provided as a template and does not constitute legal advice.
privacy.section1Content: We may collect information that you provide directly, such as your name, email address, shipping address, billing details, and order information. We may also collect technical data such as your IP address, browser type, device information, and basic usage data about how you interact with the site.
privacy.section2Content: This site may use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences, keep your session active, and understand how visitors use the site. You can usually manage cookie preferences through your browser settings, although disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of the site.
privacy.section3Content: Payments on this site may be processed by third-party providers such as Stripe. When you make a payment, certain data (such as your card details and billing information) is handled directly by the payment provider in accordance with their own privacy and security practices. We do not store full payment card details on our own servers.
privacy.section4Content: If you create an account, we may store information such as your login details, saved addresses, wishlists, and order history. This helps us fulfill your orders, provide customer support, and improve your experience on the site. You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential.
privacy.section5Content: We generally use your data to process and deliver orders, manage your account, provide customer support, improve our products and services, and communicate with you about your purchases or important updates. We may also use aggregated or anonymized information for analytics and product development.
privacy.section6Content: We retain personal data for as long as it is reasonably necessary to fulfill the purposes described above, comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. Retention periods may vary depending on the type of data and context of processing.
privacy.section7Content: Depending on your location, you may have rights related to your personal data, such as the right to access, correct, or delete certain information, or to object to or restrict certain types of processing. Requests of this nature will be handled in line with applicable laws and reasonable verification steps.
privacy.section8Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, you can contact us using the details provided on the Contact page. Please note that this policy may be updated from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable regulations.
privacy.disclaimer: This Privacy Policy is intended as a baseline template and does not replace jurisdiction-specific privacy notices or professional legal advice.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Review the general terms that govern the use of this site and your orders.
terms.descriptionOg: Read the baseline terms covering orders, payments, shipping, and more.
terms.subtitle: These Terms of Service are provided as a general template to describe how this site and store operate. They are not exhaustive and do not constitute legal advice.
terms.section1Content: By placing an order on this site, you confirm that all information provided is accurate and complete. Orders are subject to acceptance and availability. We reserve the right to cancel or refuse any order, for example in the case of suspected fraud, incorrect pricing, or stock issues. If your order is cancelled after payment, we will issue a refund using the original payment method where possible.
terms.section2Content: Prices displayed on the site are shown in the applicable currency for your region and are subject to change at any time. We make reasonable efforts to ensure pricing is correct but errors may occur. If we discover a pricing error after you have placed an order, we may contact you with the option to reconfirm your order at the correct price or cancel it with a refund.
terms.section3Content: Payments are processed through third-party providers such as Stripe. By submitting your payment information, you authorize the provider to charge the total amount of your order, including any applicable taxes and shipping fees. All payment transactions are subject to the provider's terms and security practices in addition to these Terms of Service.
terms.section4Content: Shipping options, costs, and estimated delivery times are shown at checkout. Any delivery estimates are indicative and not guaranteed. Once your order has been handed to the carrier, transit and delivery are subject to the carrier's service and conditions. Please refer to the Shipping & Returns page for more details about processing times and delivery expectations.
terms.section5Content: We provide a returns window for eligible items, subject to the condition that products are unworn, unwashed, and returned in their original state. Certain items may be final sale and not eligible for return. Please review the Shipping & Returns page for details about how to initiate a return or exchange and what conditions apply in your region.
terms.section6Content: All content on this site—including designs, graphics, logos, text, and photography—is owned by or licensed to us and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, or create derivative works from this content without prior written permission, except as permitted by law for personal, non-commercial use.
terms.section7Content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the site, your inability to use the site, or any orders placed through it. Nothing in these Terms of Service is intended to exclude or limit any rights you may have under mandatory consumer protection laws.
terms.section8Content: These Terms of Service are a general template and may be adapted to the laws of the country or region in which the business is established. Any disputes related to your use of the site or orders placed through it will ordinarily be subject to the jurisdiction and laws specified by the final, local version of these terms.
terms.disclaimer: This document is provided as a baseline template and should be reviewed and adapted with professional legal guidance to ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations in your jurisdiction.
